metadata.description: Official Ophis plugins for Claude Code. Swap tokens onchain via the Ophis MCP server: MEV-protected, gasless, keyless.

plugins.name: ophis
plugins.description: Swap tokens onchain via Ophis: an intent-based DEX (a CoW Protocol deployment) that is MEV-protected, gasless for the trader, keyless, and rebate-eligible. Bundles the Ophis MCP server and the ophis-swap workflow skill.
